name: Pasta Ala Puttanesca
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Spaghetti, linguini, or other pasta of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 4 quarts of water to a boil; add salt and stir in spaghetti. Cook until tender but still firm. Drain, and transfer to heated plates.
2. While the spaghetti is cooking, drain the tomatoes, cut them across into halves, and squeeze out as much liquid as possible. Combine tomatoes and olive oil in a skillet and bring to a boil. Keep the sauce at a full boil and add remaining ingredients except pasta, one at a time, stirring frequently.
3. Reduce heat and continue to cook for a few minutes, or until sauce has thickened to your liking. Serve immediately over hot pasta and garnish with additional parsley.
